channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cars Jumping Red Light on Pedrstrian Crossing, 16th July
item.description:
Hi, Over the past few months I have witnessed a number of cars jumping the red light on the pedestrian crossing on Widmore road (just by the Breaside prep school) Today I saw two at the same time as I waited to cross with my young nephew. This feels like a tragedy waiting to happen. Is there any the people doing this can be tracked down? Best regards, Chris
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging ivy, 16th July
item.description:
Overhanging vegetation/- have to duck to get the bus

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensmead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in garden, 16th July
item.description:
I have fox cubs in my garden each year, usually they have left by this time. However one has been sleeping in the corner of my garden by the side of the shed during the day. This morning I noticed it was lying strange but I could see it breathing. However I checked as about 18.30 and it had died. Would you please send someone to collect it ASAP as in this heat flies and maggots will be all over it. Also I have a 6 month old baby and I'm worried about bacteria/germs etc. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnside Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 16th July
item.description:
Abandoned building debris
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement Leak on Kidbrooke Park Road, 16th July
item.description:
There has been a leak covering the pavement for more than 1 month now (July 2026). It covers the entire width of the pavement often making it very difficult for pedestrians to walk.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and upturned bin, 16th July
item.description:
Please clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): City Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet dropped next recycle bins, 16th July
item.description:
Someone dropped these items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledbury Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping, 16th July
item.description:
Flytipping at entrance of Wick Village E9 5NX

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silkmills Square, Hackney, London

item.title: Hole opening up in road, 16th July
item.description:
Road is sagging (10*10 inches?) and a hole (3*3 inches?) opening up in the road by the drain cover where a previous repair seems to have been done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen down, 16th July
item.description:
Tree has fallen down towards pavement, currently resting on a face but blocking the way for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Narrowed walkway bikes/bin/hedge, 16th July
item.description:
Pathway is substantially narrowed by bins being stored on the pavement next to an overgrown hedge, abandoned bikes and a large tree. Too narrow to pass when carry shopping, pedestrians need to walk in road. Likely an older householder with mobility challenges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to bollards etc, 16th July
item.description:
Bollard, concrete base damaged by vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodenhurst Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti over the walls, benches and railings., 16th July
item.description:
This area needs to be cleaned. Not only full of trash, broken glasses but graffitied over on multiple surfaces. Need a scrub and a proper clean. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Tunnel, Shadwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 16th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I walked up the foot path at the back of the properties on Brookend Road and I came across a newly dead adult fox, 16th July
item.description:
Newly dead fox on communal ground a top of access footpath Fox covered in flies presents a health hazard in this heat please can it be removed as soon as possible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Brookend Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty, broken glasses everywhere, 16th July
item.description:
Broken glasses everywhere, it is a danger to walk my dog around here. Area needs to be cleaned from time to time!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Tunnel, Shadwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty, full of trash, 16th July
item.description:
The area does not appear to have been cleaned, ever.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Tunnel, Shadwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned electric bike at entrance to public alleyway, 16th July
item.description:
Abandoned electric bike with battery missing at entrance to alleyway between Ravensbury Road and Clarendon Green. Been there at least 24 hours.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Ravensbury Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London

item.title: Items dumped by chute, 16th July
